name: Multi-mode Vertical (Full + Split) with Blue Word-Sweep Captions
description: Single-presenter vertical talking-head that CUTS between two display states over one full-screen face master (bottom_visual_master.mp4): (1) full-screen face, (2) split — B-roll/screen fills the top half, the face drops to a full-width bottom rectangle. The layout switch is driven entirely by the per-insert display mode chosen at the B-roll step, so the locked v88 16-step pipeline is unchanged (single face = audio master, B-roll inserts as usual). Captions are a clean BLUE WORD-SWEEP — every word white, the spoken word pops to blue, no box, no particles — centered over the seam for easy reading.

layout.background: fallback bg.png (rarely visible — the face video covers it)
layout.mainVideo: bottom_visual_master.mp4 full-screen, object-fit cover, gentle inner zoom 1.0 -> 1.05

displayModes.full: B-roll fills the whole 1080x1920 frame, replacing the face (same as Template 02/04).
displayModes.split-top: B-roll fills the TOP half (0..960), the face animates down to a full-bleed BOTTOM rectangle (960..1920, object-position 50% 30% to frame the head). Reverts to full-screen when the insert ends. Edge-to-edge 50/50, no frames — caption sits on the seam.

layout.captionPosition: centered over the seam, bottom: 910px (build-sweep-captions.py arg 4; v88-clip.sh passes CAPTION_BOTTOM=910 for T10). Sits at the split seam in split mode and mid-low over the face in full mode.

captions.style: BIZDRIVE Blue Word-Sweep — every word in the group is solid white from the moment the group appears; the currently-spoken word pops to BLUE (#2EA8FF) with a small scale bump, then settles back to white. No coloured box, no particles, no backing pill — bare bold text with a heavy shadow for readability over video. Centered over the seam.
captions.goldTokenRules: the caption-groups.json 'gold' flag is still parsed (numbers / money / brand / tech) but in this template it only adds a slightly stronger scale pop — the active colour is always blue, per the white+blue spec.
captions.perWordTiming: interpolated inside each group by character weight (caption-groups.json carries group start/end + token text+gold only) — same schema as Template 04/09.

audio.topMuted: n/a — single full-screen face master; B-roll inserts are muted
audio.polishChain: highpass80, lowpass12k, afftdn, agate, acompressor, loudnorm 2-pass, alimiter, apad

bgm.mixNote: mix BGM with ffmpeg amix normalize=0 so the voice keeps its polished level

broll.host: full-screen (full) or top half (split-top) — chosen per insert by add-broll.py
broll.aiGenNote: Generate B-roll at aspect_ratio 9:16, resolution 720p, generate_audio false. split-top crops to its box via object-fit cover, so 9:16 source works for both modes.

sfx.pacing: ~1 SFX per 12s of final video; fewer for clips under 60s
sfx.note: At most 5, each context-matched (whoosh on layout switches, ding on CTA, punch on punchlines).

label.th: ตัดช่วงเงียบ (dead air)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 6 (Silero VAD); Step 7 ใช้แค่ rough EDL — คงจังหวะพูดเดิมไว้

label.th: ปรับแต่งเสียงพูด (polish)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 8 — ใช้เสียงดิบจาก visual master; Step 9 re-transcribe ใช้เสียงดิบแทน

label.th: ซับ / คำบรรยายไทย

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 9-11 ส่วน caption (re-transcribe, post-process subagent, build-sweep-captions.py); ไม่ mount caption track
ข้าม generate-broll + add-broll.py — ไม่มีภาพแทรก (หน้าเต็มตลอด)

label.th: โหมดแสดงภาพแทรก
จำนวนสูงสุด
เพลงประกอบ (BGM)

features.whenOff: mix-sfx.py ข้าม BGM — final.mp4 = speech (+ SFX) เท่านั้น

label.th: ระดับเสียง
เอฟเฟกต์เสียง (SFX)

features.whenOff: sfx-plan.json มี sfx: [] ว่าง — ไม่มีเอฟเฟกต์เสียง
ข้าม Step 16 — ส่งมอบ output/finals/final.mp4 โดยไม่ฝัง cover art

label.th: บรรทัดบน (ขาว)
บรรทัดเด่น (ทอง)
บรรทัดล่าง (ฟ้า)

pipeline.differenceFromTemplate04: Same single-face full-screen base + identical v88 pipeline. Two changes: (1) Step 11 captions use scripts/build-sweep-captions.py (blue word-sweep) instead of build-highlight-captions.py (red/gold box). (2) scripts/add-broll.py stamps each insert with a data-display-mode (full / split-top); index.html positions each insert into its box and, for split-top, animates the face into the bottom rectangle for the insert's duration.

reference.note: LOCKED 2026-06-25. Created from Top1% / อาจารย์อริน screenshots; validated end-to-end on the 'Claude models' clip (out-of-studio slides+face). 3 beats: full-face ↔ split-top slides (~67%) ↔ full-screen OpenRouter AI insert; blue word-sweep captions; face-first framing (RULE). Full reproducible playbook: templates/10-multimode-vertical-sweep/RECIPE.md. Pipeline = identical to Template 04 (single face = audio master); B-roll/slide inserts injected by hand between caption-build and render (v88-clip.sh has no B-roll step).
reference.input: jobs/2026-06-24-claude-model-t10 (Bottom02.mp4 face master + top.mp4 slides) — note jobs/ is ephemeral; recipe regenerates it
